overall.description: A static first-person view from a cyberpunk video game showing a dimly lit apartment bedroom with rumpled bedsheets and a floor-to-ceiling window overlooking a foggy, neon-lit cityscape at night.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: stationary on the bed, gazing out at the foggy cityscape through the window

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling window overlooking a foggy cityscape with distant neon lights and atmospheric haze
rumpled bed with silvery-grey sheets and blankets in the immediate foreground
dark geometric tile pattern on the wall with a ladder-like structure leaning against it
rectangular ceiling light emitting warm yellow illumination
white bathroom fixtures visible in the back left corner of the room
small electronic device with illuminated screen on a nightstand beside the bed

segments.scene_description: The scene presents a static first-person view from a cyberpunk apartment bedroom. The camera rests at waist level overlooking an unmade bed with rumpled sheets, while a massive window reveals a foggy, neon-lit cityscape outside. The room features dark tiled walls, warm overhead lighting, and a glowing device on the nightstand, creating a moody, atmospheric interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a moody cyberpunk bedroom that emphasizes the contrast between a warm interior and a cold, neon-lit exterior. It begins at waist level, focusing on the tactile details of an unmade bed with rumpled sheets. As the eye wanders, the view expands to encompass the dark tiled walls and the soft glow of a device on the nightstand under warm overhead lighting. The scene finally settles on the massive floor-to-ceiling window, where the intimate atmosphere of the room gives way to a vast, foggy cityscape shimmering with neon lights.
